_comment: Curated naming layers Lovely/OSM lack. official = circuit/ACO naming, colloquial = what drivers say. complex groups multi-corner sections. Keyed by layout id -> corners -> corner number.

1.error: location is identical to corner 2 (0.210987, 47.956831) — Dunlop Curve apex should be earlier, near ~0.2095, 47.9558; marker 0.05 looks right but the coordinate was copied from the chicane

4.error: T4 carries the Esses name but complex was null — T4 and T5 together are the Esses de la Forêt

7.error: complex 'Mulsanne Straight Chicanes' is invalid — the two chicanes are ~2 km apart and never spoken of as one unit (drivers say 'first chicane' / 'second chicane'); also this right-left chicane is represented by a single corner entry

8.error: complex 'Mulsanne Straight Chicanes' should be removed (not a contiguous complex); this left-right chicane is represented by a single corner entry

9.error: scale 2 is too generous — Mulsanne Corner is the slowest point on the lap (~1st/2nd gear, ~100° tightening right), should be scale 1

11.error: scale 4 slightly high — the left at Indianapolis is a 2nd/3rd-gear banked left, scale 3 fits better; complex should pair with T10

12.error: scale 3 too high — Arnage is a slow 1st/2nd-gear right-hander, scale 2

16.error: scale 5 slightly high — Karting is the tightening right where the Porsche Curves slow down, scale 4 fits better

17.error: official name should be 'Virage Corvette', not 'Virage du Corvette'; scale 4 rather than 5 — it's the slowest part of the Porsche Curves sequence

18.error: scale 4 slightly high — first Ford chicane is a 2nd/3rd-gear flick, scale 3

20.error: marker 0.98 duplicates T19's marker and the coordinate (0.20753, 47.948222) is essentially identical to T19's (0.207512, 47.948214) — second Ford chicane apex should be further north, near ~0.2078, 47.9489

3.error: T3 is the second element of the Dunlop Chicane but was left unnamed and unassigned to the complex

5.error: second element of the Esses left unnamed

10.error: T10 is the fast right entry kink of Indianapolis — it should be named and grouped with T11, not left as an anonymous corner

19.error: T19 is the exit of the first Ford chicane — should be named and assigned to the Ford Chicanes complex, not left anonymous

21.error: T21 is the final right of the second Ford chicane (the Raccordement) — should be named and assigned to the Ford Chicanes complex

24h.errors_summary: Directions all verified correct against geometry; main issues: T1 coordinate duplicated from T2, T20 coordinate/marker duplicated from T19, chicane partner corners (T3, T5, T19, T21) left unnamed and outside their complexes, the two Mulsanne chicanes wrongly grouped as one complex despite being ~2 km apart (and each modelled as a single corner instead of two), and Mulsanne Corner severity overrated at 2 instead of 1.
